test-suite.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability
test-suite.description: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability

test-case.description: resolver populates Request.Context and condition references resolved data
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.resolver populates Request.Context and condition references resolved data

test-case.description: step is NotApplicable when resolver returns empty entitlements and condition requires them
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.step is NotApplicable when resolver returns empty entitlements and condition requires them

test-case.description: IdLE.Identity.Read resolver populates Request.Context.Identity.Profile
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.IdLE.Identity.Read resolver populates Request.Context.Identity.Profile

test-case.description: IdLE.Identity.Read resolver flattens Attributes to top-level properties
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.IdLE.Identity.Read resolver flattens Attributes to top-level properties

test-case.description: IdLE.Identity.Read resolver handles null Attributes gracefully
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.IdLE.Identity.Read resolver handles null Attributes gracefully

test-case.description: IdLE.Identity.Read resolver handles empty Attributes hashtable
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.IdLE.Identity.Read resolver handles empty Attributes hashtable

test-case.description: IdLE.Identity.Read resolver does not overwrite core properties with conflicting attributes
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver runs before conditions and influences step applicability.IdLE.Identity.Read resolver does not overwrite core properties with conflicting attributes

test-suite.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.To is not a supported key (output path is predefined per capability)
test-suite.description: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.To is not a supported key (output path is predefined per capability)

test-case.description: rejects a resolver entry that specifies To (unknown key)
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.To is not a supported key (output path is predefined per capability).rejects a resolver entry that specifies To (unknown key)

test-case.description: rejects a resolver that uses a capability not in the read-only allow-list
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Non-allow-listed capability.rejects a resolver that uses a capability not in the read-only allow-list

test-suite.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver output captured in plan snapshot
test-suite.description: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver output captured in plan snapshot

test-case.description: plan.Request.Context contains the resolved value after planning
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Resolver output captured in plan snapshot.plan.Request.Context contains the resolved value after planning

test-case.description: auto-selects provider when Provider is not specified in resolver
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Provider auto-selection.auto-selects provider when Provider is not specified in resolver

test-case.description: fails when no provider supports the capability and Provider is not specified
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Provider auto-selection.fails when no provider supports the capability and Provider is not specified

test-suite.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Workflow schema validation for ContextResolvers
test-suite.description: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Workflow schema validation for ContextResolvers

test-case.description: rejects unknown keys in a resolver entry
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Workflow schema validation for ContextResolvers.rejects unknown keys in a resolver entry

test-case.description: rejects a resolver missing the required Capability key
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Workflow schema validation for ContextResolvers.rejects a resolver missing the required Capability key

test-case.description: resolves Request.IdentityKeys template in With.IdentityKey
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Template resolution in With.resolves Request.IdentityKeys template in With.IdentityKey

test-case.description: resolves templates using flattened Identity.Profile attributes
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Template resolution in With.resolves templates using flattened Identity.Profile attributes

test-case.description: passes AuthSession to ListEntitlements when provider method supports it
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Auth session threading.passes AuthSession to ListEntitlements when provider method supports it

test-case.description: fails when multiple providers support the same capability and Provider is not specified
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Provider ambiguity detection.fails when multiple providers support the same capability and Provider is not specified

test-case.description: fails when an intermediate context node is a non-dictionary type
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Context type conflict detection.fails when an intermediate context node is a non-dictionary type

test-case.description: creates Request.Context when the request has no Context property
test-case.name: New-IdlePlan - ContextResolvers.Request.Context guard in New-IdlePlanObject.creates Request.Context when the request has no Context property
